title: Round 4 — the merge: crown it or send it back
prompt: Here is the ONE synthesis your merge ordered — Living Concierge is killed for good. The flow: (1) brief exactly as today, (2) the concierge asks as many clarifying questions as it takes, (3) the response IS the living gallery — multiple method cards seeded live from your brief and answers, Mind map ribboned with the quoted reason, (4) picking it opens the live co-edited canvas. If this is the flow we build: triage it keep and crown it 🏁 Final, then Finalize & close out — I'll capture it, compose the decision poster, and closeout will hand you the loopable build plan (protocol tree payload → mind-elixir board → intake gallery). If anything is off, note it and iterate — the note becomes the fix.

options.label: Concierge → Living Gallery
options.description: Brief, then adaptive questions until confident, answered by a living gallery of method cards genuinely seeded from your answers — pick one and the live co-edited canvas opens.

survey.elaborationPrompt: Is this the flow we build? Crown it Final and Finalize — or say exactly what the fix is.
